title: Corn Creeper inflicts 5x Atk damage on first attack once

card.rawText: Inflict 5x Atk damage during this card's first attack. This effect can only occur 1 time while this card is on the field.

plan.title: Corn Creeper inflicts 5x Atk damage on first attack once
plan.summary: Battle Corn Creeper and verify its first attack gets the 5x attack damage multiplier.

notes: Place Corn Creeper on player_1 field as primary.
This is Corn Creeper first attack while on the field.

steps: Resolve first hit and damage roll.

expectedAssertions.label: Corn Creeper 5x first attack multiplier applied

manualVerification: The 5x multiplier should only occur one time while Corn Creeper remains on the field.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
